case_title: BRENNAN, WILLIAM P vs. PEREZ, ISMAEL P et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNAN, WILLIAM P AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ISMAEL P GOMEZ, ALFREDO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-16-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-27-1997

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-14-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-14-1997, $100 SANCTION ON PLFF'S COUNSEL PAYABLE 5/29/97. OSC IS TO WHY NO PROOF OF SERVICE, NO STATUS CONFERENCE FILED & NO APPEARANCE ON 5/14/97. HEARING SET FOR JUL-16-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-16-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE AS TO WHY NO POS AND SC STATEMENT HAS BEEN FILED. PLTF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTION SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED. HEARING SET FOR MAY-14-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNAN, WILLIAM P

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-16-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-16-1997, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AGAINST DEFTS. TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY BERT M VEGA., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-31-1997 CONTINUED FROM JUL-16-1997 TO SEP-03-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
